_meta.citation: ROADMAP Phase 6 SC-1 (negative-NPV with $5k closing costs at 12-month horizon); REFI-06 fixture anchor. Per D-13: SC-1 'same rate $5k closing' over full 25y is still positive (~$60k savings); horizon=12 simulates short borrower tenure (FHFA median ~13y) and yields the negative-NPV anchor.
